title: Moosend vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Moosend vs Sendinblue: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between Moosend and Sendinblue comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Moosend is built for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while Sendinblue targets transactional email and SMS campaigns. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small Businesses Wanting Unlimited Emails At Low Cost

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and SMS campaigns

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Moosend wins for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while Sendinblue is stronger for transactional email and SMS campaigns. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Moosend starts at a lower price point ($9/mo vs $25/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Sendinblue to Moosend is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
